entities.description: Physiological attributes of the wheat crop measured during growth

entities.description: The overall development and growth of the wheat crop

entities.description: The amount of water utilized by the wheat crop

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The specific weight of grain produced per unit area

entities.name: ABOVE-GROUND DRY WEIGHT
entities.description: The biomass of the crop above the soil surface at harvest

entities.description: The total amount of solar radiation captured by the crop canopy

entities.name: RADIATION USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The efficiency with which the crop converts intercepted radiation into biomass

entities.description: A survey method (EM 38) used to identify salinity levels

entities.description: A measurement used to quantify soil salinity levels
